task.zh: 加倍实验！抛20次硬币，正面和反面的比例会更接近一半吗？
task.en: Double the experiment! Flip 20 times — will heads and tails get closer to half?

question.zh: 抛20次硬币后，正面的比例更接近50%了吗？
question.en: After 20 flips, is the heads ratio closer to 50%?

hints.zh: 实验次数越多，结果越接近一半一半
hints.en: More experiments → results get closer to 50-50

hints.zh: 这就是大数定律的力量！
hints.en: This is the power of the Law of Large Numbers!
